languages.text: "На всякий случай, уточню: ты же не собираешься плюхнуться в купальню и приступить к протоколам очистки?"
"Just to confirm: you aren't going to dunk yourself in the bath and begin your cleaning protocols, are you?"

languages.original_text: "Just to confirm: you aren't going to dunk yourself in the bath and begin your cleaning protocols, are you?"

languages.text: « Simple confirmation : vous n'allez pas vous poser dans le bain et entamer vos protocoles d'ablution, n'est-ce pas ? »
languages.original_text: "Just to confirm: you aren't going to dunk yourself in the bath and begin your cleaning protocols, are you?"

traits.locale_text: « Simple confirmation : vous n'allez pas vous poser dans le bain et entamer vos protocoles d'ablution, n'est-ce pas ? »

languages.text: "Sadece teyit etmek için soruyorum... Suya dalıp temizlenme protokollerine başlamayacaksın, değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "Just to confirm: you aren't going to dunk yourself in the bath and begin your cleaning protocols, are you?"

traits.locale_text: "Sadece teyit etmek için soruyorum... Suya dalıp temizlenme protokollerine başlamayacaksın, değil mi?"

languages.text: 「一応確認しておくが――君は風呂に飛び込んで洗浄プロトコルを始めたりはしないだろうな？」
languages.original_text: "Just to confirm: you aren't going to dunk yourself in the bath and begin your cleaning protocols, are you?"

traits.locale_text: 「一応確認しておくが――君は風呂に飛び込んで洗浄プロトコルを始めたりはしないだろうな？」

languages.text: "Nur zur Sicherheit: Ihr werdet nicht in das Bad springen und mit Euren Reinigungsprotokollen beginnen, ja?"
languages.original_text: "Just to confirm: you aren't going to dunk yourself in the bath and begin your cleaning protocols, are you?"
